title: Green People Organic Babies Calming Nappy Cream 50ml | Natural & Organic Zinc Oxide Nappy Cream | Eczema-Friendly, Gentle on Sensitive Skin & Suitable from Birth | Paraben Free | Vegan, Cruelty Free
features: NATURAL & ORGANIC nappy cream for babies. 88% certified organic ingredients. Skin-friendly ingredients to protect little bottoms from the dampness that may lead to nappy rash. Eczema-friendly and suitable for use on babies from birth.

PETROCHEMICAL-FREE formula for babies’ delicate skin. Made with calming plant oils and no artificial fragrance. This natural nappy cream can be applied after every nappy change and is suitable for use with either disposable or cloth nappies.

ZINC OXIDE, CHAMOMILE, CALENDULA & BERRY WAX are our key plant and mineral actives. Zinc Oxide, Chamomile and Calendula soothe, calm and protect skin, whilst Berry Wax helps to ward off dampness that can cause discomfort.

CRUELTY FREE & SUSTAINABLY SOURCED ingredients mean you can look after your baby’s skin whilst maintaining your high ethical standards. Vegan formula certified by The Vegan Society. We have never, and will never, test on animals.

SENSITIVE SKIN & ECZEMA Designed especially to meet the needs of babies with sensitive skin and who may be prone to eczema, this organic nappy cream contains pure, plant-based ingredients that are kind to children’s delicate skin barrier.
description: Product Description Green People organic nappy cream baby balm is a soothing organic balm to protect against dampness that leads to a nappy rash. It gently protects and restores the nappy area, soothes and relieves skin redness. It is naturally rich in Omega 3and6 and soothing Zinc Oxide. Suitable for sensitive skin prone to eczema, psoriasis and dermatitis. 99 Percent certified organic agricultural ingredients. Ingredients Aqua, Zinc Oxide (Non-Nano), Caprylic/Capric Triglyceride, Cannabis Sativa (Hemp) Seed Oil, Polyglyceryl-3 Polyricinoleate, Helianthus Annuus (Sunflower) Seed Oil, Glycerin, Sorbitan Olivate, Citric Acid, Rhus Verniciflua Peel Cera, Calendula Officinalis (Calendula) Flower Extract, Aloe Barbadensis (Aloe) Leaf Juice Powder, Chamomilla Recutita (Chamomile) Flower Extract, Polyglyceryl-3 Ricinoleate, Glyceryl Caprylate, Tocopherol, Dehydroacetic Acid, Benzyl Alcohol, Potassium Sorbate, Sodium Benzoate. 88.6 Percent Certified Organic Agricultural Ingredients Directions Apply Calming Nappy Cream sparingly to freshly washed and dried skin. Re-apply as often as necessary, and at each nappy change. Best kept in a warm room for general use, as beeswax content may crystallise when exposed to extreme cold. Safety Warning Avoid contact with eyes. See more
